race.description: Dillion & Sons Dungog Dash Provincial Handicap (Bm68)
race.comment: Flying mare GIRLS WEEKEND (5) has led for the judge at all four runs this prep, with one win two back over 1010m at Moruya. Coming back to 900m looks a dream scenario. Has a wide gate but will ping the lids, cross and lead, and prove tough to reel in. SHALL BE (1) has raced three times this prep, all in town, and struggled to make any impact. Very fit and coming into a 900m race here is the key as he has won three from four over this sharp Newcastle journey. CASHAWAY GOLD (2) returned from a ten-month break with a tough all-the-way win over 1007m at Taree recently. Took a while to put it together but is unbeaten in her last three. Probably takes a sit from the wide gate and is right in contention. SINGING STAR (6) chased CASHAWAY GOLD all the way last start at Taree, getting within a length on the line. Honest mare who will be finishing off again. CAPITAL DANCER (8) has a strong record here at this specialist journey and cannot be ruled out.
